---
title: "Writing"
description: "Essays on how modern language models work, and on building and evaluating the systems around them."
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    body-classes: writing-index
listing:
  # Standalone posts (posts/<slug>/index.qmd) and individual series *parts*
  # (posts/series/<slug>/<part>/index.qmd). Series *landings* are intentionally
  # excluded — they live on /series and would otherwise duplicate the index.
  contents:
    - "posts/*/index.qmd"
    - "posts/series/*/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed:
    title: "Yee Seng Chan — Writing"
    description: "Essays on how modern language models work, and on building and evaluating the systems around them."
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY · MMM D"
  page-size: 25
---

::: {.column-body}
Individual essays, newest first. Multi-part arguments are collected under [Series](series.qmd).
:::
